case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS PEGUEROS NOEMI

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEGUEROS NOEMI
